'''''Star Wars: Galactic Crisis!''''' is a young readers book written by [[Ryder Windham]] that was published by [[Dorling Kindersley|DK]] at reading level 4.

==Publisher's summary==
''Read the thrilling story of the Clone Wars, from the first battles to the dramatic events in ''Revenge of the Sith''''.

==Contents==
*Secret identity
*[[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]] threatened
*Escape to [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]]
*Criminal world
*Fight for freedom
*[[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin]] saves Naboo
*Ten years later
*[[Padmé Amidala/Legends|Padmé]] in danger
*Surprise at [[Kamino/Legends|Kamino]]
*The [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|clone army]]
*Secret plans
*Taken prisoner
*Execution arena
*In secret
*[[Dooku/Legends|Dooku]] betrayed
*Split loyalties
*[[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]]
*Total power
*Attack on [[Mustafar/Legends|Mustafar]]
*Terrible duel
*Birth and death
*The future
*Glossary
